DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS GREGORY PERIEFF AND ALEXANDER PERIEFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY. THE MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 2030.290. PLAINTIFFS SHALL PROVIDE FULL RESPONSES BY DECEMBER 18, 2013. PLAINTIFFS HAVE AGREED TO PAY THE MONEY DUE PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S PREVIOUS ORDER BY DECEMBER 12, 2013. IF THE MONEY IS NOT PAID, THE COURT WILL CONSIDER A CONTEMPT MOTION. PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS RELATED TO FILING THIS MOTION IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000 PURSUANT TO CCP 2023.030. (PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE PRO TEM: ARLENE BARTON; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302)

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Discovery
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance by either party, the Court adopts its tentative ruling on DEFENDANTs GREGORY PERIEFF and ALEXANDER PERIEFF's Motion To Compel Discovery. The motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and special interrogatories is granted pursuant to CCP section 2030.290. Plaintiffs shall provide full responses by December 18, 2013. Plaintiffs have agreed to pay the money due pursuant to the Court's previous Order by December 12, 2013. If the money is not paid, the Court will consider a contempt motion. Plaintiffs' request for sanctions related to filing this motion is granted in the amount of $2,000 pursuant to CCP 2023.030. (Prevailing party to submit a form of order.) Judge Pro Tem: Arlene Barton; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
